page_content:
Prerequisite: PHYS623 and PHYS622.

PHYS748 Seminar in Experimental Nuclear Physics (1 Credit) PHYS749 Seminar in Theoretical Nuclear Physics (1 Credit)

PHYS752 Elementary Particle Physics II: Theory (3 Credits)

Survey of elementary particles and their properties, quantum field theory, meson theory, weak interactions, possible extensions of elementary particle theory.
